description: End-on cross-section of a 100 mm round bar (Ø dimension), 0° contact probe at top dead center with couplant film, rim rotation arrow, bright centerline stringer/pipe reflector dot; right: mini A-scan with IP and 0/50/100 mm ticks. Reveals: BROADSIDE ring+ping on the center reflector, radial beam wedge + center ray, tall centerline echo at 50 mm (~17 µs), shorter dimmed far-wall echo (~34 µs, BACK WALL DROPS).
